git.name: check_git_all
git.description: Aggregate tool that runs all enabled Git commit validators and returns a single combined report.

tasks.name: check_git_commit_content
tasks.description: Enforces commit content rules from git-commit-format.instructions.md: detects anti-patterns in the commit message body.

tasks.name: check_git_commit_format
tasks.description: Enforces commit format rules from git-commit-format.instructions.md: Conventional Commits structure and line-length limits.

editorconfig.name: get_editorconfig
editorconfig.description: Resolves effective .editorconfig properties for a given file path by walking the directory tree, evaluating glob patterns and section cascading, and returning final key-value pairs.
